center.name: 吉大港
center.summary: 吉大港是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑背燕尾，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also found in the Sylhet and Chittagong regions of Bangladesh, where it is uncommon

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also found in the Sylhet and Chittagong regions of Bangladesh, where it is uncommon
